title: Grobot Bridge Plan Error Codes v1
description: Canonical error-code registry for gateway/src/extensions/bridge-cli.ts plan-mode responses.

codes.description: No active plan exists for current session.
Plan exists but current status cannot enter apply.
Active plan vanished during review commit step.
Review blocked due to unresolved-question findings.
Plan quality guard blocked approval/apply until plan quality recovers.
Plan approval artifacts could not be persisted.
Plan status failed to transition into applying.
Apply execution failed after entering applying.
Plan-only guard could not append note.
Plan-only guard denied normal execution and appended note.
